title: Wheat City Hardcore
overview: Brandon, Manitoba may not stand out on the nation's musical map. But for independent musicians touring Canada in the 1990s, The Wheat City was a punk rock hotbed. With the twentieth anniversary of their band's inception approaching, four friends decide to pay tribute to the scene they helped create and reunite for one last show.
